LAW AND MOTION 302, THE LADVA LAW FIRM'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFFS MARIANNA PORRAS, XOCHILT PORRAS, SANTIAGO NARVAEZ AND WILLIAM NARVAEZ IS GRANTED FOR GOOD CAUSE SHOWING. NO OPPOSITION FILED. COUNSEL REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT THE NON-ADULT INDIVIDUALS LISTED AS CLIENTS ON THE MOVING PAPERS HAVE NO GUARDIAN AD LITEM APPOINTED FOR ALL OR ANY OF THEM. SERVICE OF THE ORDER MUST BE MADE ON CLIENTS LAST KNOWN ADDRESS AND ALSO PURSUANT TO CCP 1011(B) AND CA RULES OF COURT 3.292 ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976 (302/MJM)

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance nor objection. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed pursuant to Gov. Code 68608 (b). The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2015 Continued To Apr-07-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to APR-07-2015 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Aug-13-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOHN HENNING III OF THE LADVA LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 296-8844, MOVING PARTY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE LADVA LAW FIRM'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFFS MARIANNA PORRAS, XOCHILT PORRAS, SANTIAGO NARVAEZ AND WILLIAM NARVAEZ is Granted for good cause showing. No opposition filed. Counsel represented to the court that the non-adult individuals listed as clients on the moving papers have no guardian ad litem appointed for all or any of them. Service of the order must be made on clients last known address and also pursuant to CCP 1011(b) and CA Rules of Court 3.292 ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J.
